notes: Add DeepSeek provider with full service-switching support: new_chat, send_chat, attach_files (upload detection via ds-button--disabled), apply_settings (Instant/Expert/Vision), redo_response (SVG path fingerprint), stop_response, get_last_response, get_account_info. Login detection via textarea presence — auto-relaunches headed browser for human verification when needed. Switch between Gemini and DeepSeek at runtime via switch_service MCP tool.
